title: senecio conyzifolius
intro: Senecio conyzifolius, also known as Butterfly Weed or Butter Print Daisy, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Senecio conyzifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
